scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n vite,php,queue -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev" "php artisan serve --port=2000" "php artisan queue:listen --queue=default,whatsapp,receipts --tries=3 --timeout=180"
scripts.dev:whatsapp: concurrently -n vite,php,queue,evolution -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev" "php artisan serve --port=2000" "php artisan queue:listen --queue=default,whatsapp,receipts --tries=3 --timeout=180" "npm run evolution"
